episodes.title: South Africa's Most EVIL Cult - The Krugersdorp Killers
episodes.description:
Between 2012 and 2016, a group calling themselves Electus Per Deus — “Chosen By God” — terrorised the town of Krugersdorp, South Africa.

Led by Cecilia Steyn, a mother of two and a police officer’s wife, this cult believed they were warriors in a spiritual war. They claimed God spoke directly to them. They said their victims were demons. And they believed murder was justified.

What followed was a series of horrifying crimes including fraud, robbery, torture, staged deaths, and the murder of 11 people.

This is the story of the Krugersdorp Killers - one of the darkest and most disturbing true crime cases in South African history.

In this video we cover:

•  How the cult started inside a Bible study group
•  The manipulation and control of Cecilia Steyn
•  The role of Zak Valentine and the staged life-insurance death
•  The “appointment murders” that shocked Gauteng
•  How the police finally caught them
•  The life sentences handed down in 2019
•  And what Cecilia Steyn is doing in prison today

Buckle up, this one is wild!!
